title: rubus orthocanthus
intro: Rubus orthocanthus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus orthocanthus include its ability to protect against oxidative stress, support cardiovascular health, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
